title: Vishal in Laatti Charge
subTitle: Muruganantham, a dedicated police constable, is trapped in a high-rise with his son, forced to fight ruthless enemies while protecting the boy and finding a way to escape.

title: Choron Ka Chor
subTitle: Choron Ka Chor

title: Meri Saugandh
subTitle: Ramu loves Lakshmi, whose father is the chief of the village. In order to prove his love, Ramu must win a challenge posed by a rival village and beat Giridhar, who is also keen on marrying Lakshmi.

title: Ek Tha Nayak
subTitle: When a respected police officer is killed by a gangster, his younger brother decides to avenge him by hunting the man down.

title: The Masterpiece
subTitle: A young man falls in with the wrong crowd and strays from heroic deeds. However, an accidental encounter with danger forces him to change his ways.

title: Agent Chanakya
subTitle: Arjun, a highly sought-after RAW agent, is known for his skills at catching some of the most hardened criminals. However, he falls in danger when he goes after Ibrahim Qureshi, a terrorist.

title: Meri Taqat Mera Faisla
subTitle: A young man follows in his father's footsteps by working for the welfare of the people living in his district. However, a corrupt politician threatens to thwart his plans.

title: Mission 118
subTitle: An investigative journalist has nightmares about a young woman's murder and tries to uncover whether his dreams have any connection to reality.

title: Godfather
subTitle: The chief minister's passing wreaks havoc across the state and in his political party. However, a mysterious contender for the post rises to eradicate wrongdoers.

title: Tantra
subTitle: Rekha, a woman with the ability to perceive spirits, sees her life take a dark turn when she encounters a sinister black magic practitioner.

title: Das Ka Dhamki
subTitle: A financially struggling waiter's life drastically changes course when he learns of his rich lookalike, the CEO of a pharmaceutical company.

title: Das Ka Dhamki
subTitle: A financially struggling waiter's life drastically changes course when he learns of his rich lookalike, the CEO of a pharmaceutical company.

title: Kya Yehi Pyaar Hai
subTitle: Rahul falls in love with Sandhya, a fellow college student, but realises that she does not reciprocate his feelings. Undeterred by her rejection, he still pursues her but pays a huge price for it.

title: Khallas
subTitle: Rishi, an officer, is sent on an undercover mission to Hyderabad, where he poses as a teacher to gather intel on a gangster. However, his mission takes an unexpected turn when he falls in love with his student.

title: Main Hoon Dandadhikari
subTitle: Following his father's death, a man gives up on his dream to become a film-maker and joins the police force. He then attempts to track down a psychopathic killer who targets schoolgirls.

title: Raja Hindustani
subTitle: Raja, a taxi driver, falls in love with Aarti, a rich girl and marries her against her parents' wishes. Later, her stepmother tries to create differences between the couple.

title: Custody
subTitle: A police constable's life takes a drastic turn when he is entrusted with producing a criminal in court. While the mobster remains under his custody, Shiva must dodge every threat to keep him alive.

title: Rudhran
subTitle: A man's life takes an unexpected turn when he stumbles upon a criminal network. Determined to bring the truth to light, he sets out to expose the nefarious organisation and protect his loved ones.

title: Devaki Nandana Vasudeva
subTitle: When a prophecy declares that his nephew will cause his downfall, Kamsaraja becomes worried and stops at nothing to take him down.

title: Gabbar Is Back
subTitle: The city's administration wrongs Aditya, a commoner. To avenge his tragedy, he disguises himself as a vigilante, Gabbar, and teams up with honest government officers to expose the corrupt.

title: Aaj Ka Naya Khiladi
subTitle: Siva unknowingly crosses a ruthless gangster while robbing the Home Minister's residence. Subsequently, the gangster kidnaps the Minister's daughter in retribution.

title: Aaj Ka Naya Khiladi
subTitle: Siva unknowingly crosses a ruthless gangster while robbing the Home Minister's residence. Subsequently, the gangster kidnaps the Minister's daughter in retribution.

title: Bunglow No 17
subTitle: Gautham and Deeksha, along with their daughter, move into an isolated bungalow gifted to them by Gautham's father. Soon, they start experiencing paranormal activities around the house.

title: Vasco The Rebel
subTitle: With unwavering support from his lover, a defiant young man carves his way into the mafia world. His journey takes a turn when a relentless police officer pursues him.

title: RX 100
subTitle: Shiva has a passionate affair with Indu, a politician's daughter from the city. However, when they get separated, he becomes angry and prone to extreme violence.

title: Liger -- Saala Crossbreed
subTitle: A talented young MMA fighter trains hard to rise up the ranks. However, his goals are hindered when his lover is kidnapped.

title: Garam
subTitle: Varala, a jobless young man, leaves his home to prove himself to his father. However, before achieving his goal, he falls in love with Sameera and tries to woo and save her from gangster Biju.

title: Theeran
subTitle: Theeran, a dedicated police officer, pays the price for his honesty and faces hardships when he tries to investigate the illegal activities conducted by a powerful gangster.

title: Pogaru
subTitle: A local thug stands up against the atrocities committed on common people and fights to secure justice for them, thus earning the public's respect and affection.

title: Guardian
subTitle: An unavenged woman returns from the dead to terrify and terrorise those who tormented her when she was alive.

title: Chithha
subTitle: Living a quiet life with his niece, Eeswaran manages to provide for her and nurtures her like a parent. However, his journey takes an insidous turn when she goes missing.

title: Kaapa
subTitle: When Anand finds his pregnant wife's name on Kerala's anti-social list alongside other criminals, he sets on a determined mission to clear her name and prove her innocence.
